name: Valkyrie || (ALT) 4th July Vampire
description:
WARNING: Death and Blood, non-sexual violence.

FEMALE VERSION!

Valkyrie was born into a wealthy and influential family, gaining power and influence from a young age. Her vampirism is a result of an ancient curse placed on her family, which she has embraced and turned into a strength. She climbed the ranks of the government with her intelligence and strategic mind, eventually taking on a high-ranking position. Her business acumen led her to own several successful enterprises, further increasing her wealth and influence. Despite her power and dominance, Valkyrie has a playful and teasing side, which she shows to those she likes. She enjoys the finer things in life, including alcohol and sushi, and uses her wealth and influence to indulge in her desires.

I know 4th July is a bit late, but it is what it is :D Commissioned

  • You can join Discord if you have feedback, requests, or just want to talk! Discord invite is here!
